question_en: Is Architecture different from Civil Engineering? My child loves drawing buildings.
question_hi_hinglish: Kya Architecture aur Civil Engineering alag hain? Mere bacche ko buildings ke nakshe banana pasand hai.
answer_en: Yes! While engineers focus on the strength of the building, Architects focus on the design, beauty, and space. In 2026, with 'Smart Cities' like Naya Raipur, Architects are in high demand to design eco-friendly homes and malls. They need to clear the NATA exam after 12th.
answer_hi_hinglish: Haan! Engineer majbooti dekhte hain, par Architect building ki design aur sundarta tay karte hain. 2026 mein Naya Raipur jaise 'Smart Cities' ki wajah se naye tarike ke ghar aur malls banane ke liye Architects ki bahut demand hai. Iske liye 12th ke baad NATA exam dena hota hai.

question_en: What is 'Town Planning'? Is it a government job?
question_hi_hinglish: Ye 'Town Planning' kya hota hai? Kya isme sarkari naukri milti hai?
answer_en: Town Planners design entire colonies and city layouts. Most jobs are in the Government (Municipal Corporations/NRDA). It is a highly powerful and stable role where you decide where roads, parks, and hospitals will be built in the future.
answer_hi_hinglish: Town Planners poore sheher ya colony ka layout taiyaar karte hain. Isme zyada tar sarkari jobs (Municipal Corporation ya NRDA) milti hain. Ye ek bahut power wali post hai jisme aap tay karte hain ki future mein sadak, park aur hospital kahan banenge.

question_en: My son wants to be a Criminal Lawyer. Is it dangerous?
question_hi_hinglish: Mera beta Criminal Lawyer banna chahta hai. Kya ye khatarnak kaam hai?
answer_en: Criminal Law is about justice and the Constitution. It is a prestigious field. While it involves serious cases, a successful criminal lawyer earns immense respect and high fees. If he clears the Judiciary exam (PCS-J), he can become a Judge, which is a very safe and powerful government position.
answer_hi_hinglish: Criminal Law kanoon aur nyay ki ladayi hai. Ye bahut sammanit field hai. Han, isme bade cases hote hain par ek acche lawyer ki ijjat aur fees dono bahut hoti hain. Agar wo Judiciary exam (PCS-J) nikaal le, toh Judge ban sakta hai, jo ek bahut safe aur taqatwar sarkari post hai.

question_en: With so many online scams, is 'Cyber Law' a good career?
question_hi_hinglish: Aaj kal itne online scams ho rahe hain, kya 'Cyber Law' mein career banana sahi hai?
answer_en: Cyber Law is one of the fastest-growing fields in 2026. Experts are needed by the Police, Banks, and IT companies to fight online fraud and hacking. It’s a modern, desk-based legal job that pays very well and doesn't require going to traditional courts every day.
answer_hi_hinglish: 2026 mein Cyber Law sabse tezi se badhti field hai. Online fraud aur hacking se ladne ke liye Police, Banks aur IT companies ko inki zaroorat padti hai. Ye modern 'desk job' hai jisme roz court nahi jana padta aur salary bhi bahut acchi milti hai.

question_en: How can my child become a Scientist at ISRO or DRDO?
question_hi_hinglish: Mera baccha ISRO ya DRDO mein Scientist kaise ban sakta hai?
answer_en: They need to focus on Pure Sciences (Physics/Math) or Engineering. Clearing exams like GATE or the IIST entrance is the direct path. In 2026, India's space and defense sectors are booming, providing young scientists with global fame and a chance to serve the nation.
answer_hi_hinglish: Unhe Science (Physics/Math) ya Engineering par dhyan dena hoga. GATE ya IIST entrance exam iska sahi rasta hai. 2026 mein India ka space aur defense sector bahut tezi se badh raha hai, jisme kaam karke baccha desh ki seva ke saath-saath poori duniya mein naam kama sakta hai.

question_en: Is being a College Professor still a high-paying job?
question_hi_hinglish: Kya aaj bhi College Professor banna acchi salary wali job hai?
answer_en: Yes, especially in Government Universities and IITs/NITs. After doing a PhD and clearing the NET exam, a professor starts with a very high salary (Level 10 pay scale). It is considered the most respectful job for those who love reading and teaching.
answer_hi_hinglish: Ji haan, khaas kar sarkari universities aur IITs/NITs mein. PhD karne aur NET exam clear karne ke baad, Professor ki shuruati salary hi bahut zyada hoti hai. Jo bacche padhne-padhane ke shaukeen hain, unke liye ye sabse sammanit naukri hai.

question_en: Music is a hobby, but can it pay the bills?
question_hi_hinglish: Sangeet (Music) shauk toh thik hai, par kya isse ghar chal sakta hai?
answer_en: In 2026, Music is a professional industry. Beyond singing, there are roles like 'Sound Engineers,' 'Music Producers,' and 'Digital Content Creators.' With apps like Spotify and YouTube, an artist doesn't need Bollywood; they can earn through streaming and live shows globally.
answer_hi_hinglish: 2026 mein Music ek bada business hai. Sirf gaana hi nahi, 'Sound Engineer' aur 'Music Producer' jaise kaam bhi hote hain. Ab artist ko Bollywood ki zaroorat nahi hai; Spotify aur YouTube ke zariye wo ghar baithe apni kala se duniya bhar mein paise kama sakte hain.

question_en: My daughter is great at drawing. Should she do Fine Arts or Animation?
question_hi_hinglish: Meri beti drawing mein bahut acchi hai. Use Fine Arts karna chahiye ya Animation?
answer_en: Animation and UI/UX Design are highly commercial. While Fine Arts is for pure painting, Animation leads to jobs in the Movie and Gaming industry. If she wants a high-paying corporate job while being an artist, Animation or Graphic Design is the best route in 2026.
answer_hi_hinglish: Animation aur UI/UX Design mein paisa bahut hai. Fine Arts painting ke liye hai, par Animation se Movies aur Gaming industry mein jobs milti hain. Agar wo artist ban kar acchi corporate job chahti hai, toh Animation ya Graphic Design 2026 ka best raasta hai.
